basics.name: Jignesh Tailor
basics.title: Senior Software Engineer @ FYNDNA TechCorp
basics.summary: I’m a Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in building and scaling robust backend systems. Experienced in leading teams and fostering collaboration. Eager to contribute a results-driven approach to a dynamic team. I love solving complex problems and finding optimal solutions for them. I'm passionate about system design, clean architecture and writing code that lasts.

roles.title: Senior Software Developer
bullets: Led the design and core implementation of a NEFT system for a major Indian bank, ensuring secure, real-time digital payments for millions of customers in compliance with RBI guidelines.
Architected and engineered a suite of configurable simulators to emulate complex Core Banking operations, increasing test coverage by 70% and reducing QA cycle time by 40%.
Integrated cloud-native technologies like DAPR and GCP to streamline simulator configuration using JSON, enabling faster iteration and enhanced maintainability across dev teams.
Designed and developed a robust analytics component using Databricks, enabling real-time insights into STANDIN transaction metrics and system performance.
Tech used: Java 17, Spring Boot, Apache Kafka, Kubernetes, Temporal, DAPR, YugabyteDB, GCP

roles.title: Software Developer
bullets: Designed and developed a critical banking interface, enabling seamless integration between internal systems and client banking networks, improving transaction success rate by 30%.
Built high-fidelity Core Banking simulators using DAPR and GCP for backend service validation.
Automated test environment configuration using JSON-based templates stored on GCP, cutting setup time from hours to minutes.
Tech used: Java, Microservices, Gradle, Kubernetes, DAPR, YugabyteDB

roles.title: Junior Software Engineer
bullets: Developed and maintained full-stack features across web applications using Angular 8, Java, and MongoDB, reducing front-end load time by 30%.
Refactored legacy monolith components into microservices, improving deployment frequency and system resilience.
Implemented search optimization using Apache Solr, improving data retrieval speed by 40% in customer dashboards.
Tech used: Java, Angular 8, Cassandra, MongoDB, Apache Solr

roles.title: Software Developer Intern
bullets: Created Emoticon and GIF components and led full-stack integration into main product, increasing user engagement.
Developed new microservices using Spring Boot to replace legacy modules, enhancing scalability and maintainability.
Refactored performance-critical backend components, leading to a 20% boost in API throughput.

projects.title: Predicting Revenue using Simple Linear Regression
projects.description: Developed a predictive statistical model to forecast business revenue using historical financial data, identifying key growth patterns and assessing profitability trends.

projects.title: Breast Cancer Classification using SVM
projects.description: Developed a robust Support Vector Machine (SVM) classifier to accurately detect and categorize breast cancer instances. Leveraged complex medical datasets to optimize diagnostic precision.

achievements.context: Reduced system latency through backend optimization
Halved processing time for reconciliation through backend redesign
Increased test coverage via suite of configurable Core Banking simulators
Improved transaction success rate by developing critical banking interfaces

publications.title: Recognition Of Accessibility Features Using CNN
American Sign Language Recognition Using CNN
